rationale: Business at L3 follows AOM division structure and FT-50 journal sections. Thirty leaves split by domain (strategy, OB, marketing) with sub-splits where the working community is genuinely separate. Marketing gets 4 leaves (consumer behavior, branding/positioning, marketing analytics, digital/CX). OB gets 4 leaves (leadership, teams, organizational culture/identity, well-being). Information systems gets 3 leaves (IS strategy, digital innovation, business analytics) because the MISQ vs JMIS communities differ.

uncovered_concerns: Did not split entrepreneurship at the social-entrepreneurship vs. tech-entrepreneurship axis — the social-entrepreneurship community is smaller and folds under CSR/ESG.
Family business folds under entrepreneurship-innovation at L3.
